recipes.title: Almond and Banana Breakfast Drink Recipe
instructions: Place all ingredients into a blender
Blend until smooth
Add extra water if you prefer a weaker mixture
Pour into a tall glass and drink
recipes.summary: A healthy almond and banana breakfast drink recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Banana And Oats Protein Shake Recipe
instructions: Chose your favorite protein powder flavor
Combine all ingredients into a blender
Blend until smooth
recipes.summary: A healthy banana and oats protein shake recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Low Calorie Banana Bread Protein Muffins Recipe
instructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees
Line 12 muffin cups with paper liners
Sift together dry ingredients
In a second bowl, mix together wet ingredients
Combine wet and dry ingredients
Evenly divide batter between 12 muffin cups
Bake for approximately 12 minutes
Allow to cool before eating
recipes.summary: A healthy low calorie banana bread protein muffins recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: High Protein Blueberry Almond Pancakes Recipe
instructions: Blend oats into a powder-like consistency
Preheat pan or griddle to medium/high heat
Mix blended oats, protein powder, and baking powder
Add nonfat cottage cheese and blueberries, stir until combined
In a separate bowl, whisk eggs
Add eggs to pancake batter and gently fold in
Spoon batter onto preheated griddle to make 6 medium pancakes
Cook until middles start to bubble then flip
Cook another few minutes on the other side
recipes.summary: A healthy high protein blueberry almond pancakes recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: The Bounce-Back Protein Smoothie Recipe
instructions: Add all ingredients into a blender
Mix for 30 seconds
recipes.summary: A healthy the bounce-back protein smoothie recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: High Protein Breakfast Banana Split Recipe
instructions: Evenly divide greek yogurt into 3 separate bowls
Mix chocolate protein powder with yogurt in one bowl
Mix strawberry protein powder with yogurt in second bowl
Mix vanilla protein powder with yogurt in third bowl
Place each bowl in freezer for 20 minutes
Slice banana in half lengthwise
Remove yogurt from freezer and give each bowl a good mix
Assemble each flavor of yogurt on top of the banana
Finish off with strawberries, pineapple, whipped topping, walnuts, chocolate sauce and cherry
recipes.summary: A healthy high protein breakfast banana split recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: High Protein Chicken & Waffles Recipe
ingredients: 12 oz boneless skinless chicken breast, raw
1 cup high protein Special K cereal
instructions: Add chicken breast, milk and hot sauce to a bag, shake well and refrigerate overnight
Add cereal to food processor and blend into small pieces
Put cereal, cornmeal, paprika, salt and pepper in a bag
Preheat oven to 400 degrees
Remove chicken and coat with cereal mixture
Place on parchment-lined baking sheet
Bake for 20 minutes, reduce to 350 and bake 15 more minutes until crispy
While chicken is cooking, make waffles according to package directions
Serve chicken on top of waffles
recipes.summary: A healthy high protein chicken & waffles recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Chocolate Peanut Butter Protein Crepes Recipe
instructions: Whisk together egg whites, protein powder and sweetener
Coat a small skillet with nonstick spray, place over medium heat
Pour 1/6th of batter into pan, tilt to coat bottom in a very thin layer
Allow to cook 2 minutes then remove gently
Repeat until all batter is gone
In a bowl mix together yogurt and peanut powder
Place 2 tbsp of yogurt mixture into center of each crepe and roll up
recipes.summary: A healthy chocolate peanut butter protein crepes recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: High Protein Chocolate Peanut Butter Pancakes Recipe
ingredients: 1/4 cup oat flour or whole wheat flour
instructions: Preheat pan or griddle to medium/high heat
In a bowl mix flour, protein powder, cocoa powder, peanut flour, cinnamon, sweetener and baking powder
Add one egg yolk, milk and vanilla extract, stir until combined
In a separate bowl whisk three egg whites until stiff peaks
Gently fold egg whites into batter
Spoon batter onto preheated griddle to make about 6 medium sized pancakes
Cook until middles start to bubble then flip
recipes.summary: A healthy high protein chocolate peanut butter pancakes recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Easy Bake Chorizo & Veggie Quiche Recipe
instructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees
Coat 6 large muffin cups with nonstick spray
Heat a skillet over medium heat
Cook chorizo, onion and shredded potato
Whisk together eggs, egg whites, cottage cheese, salt and pepper
Add meat, onion, potato and broccoli to eggs
Evenly divide among 6 cups
Bake for 40-45 minutes
Allow to cool then gently remove from mold
recipes.summary: A healthy easy bake chorizo & veggie quiche recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: High Protein Coconut Pomegranate Pancakes Recipe
ingredients: Toppings: pomegranate arils, shredded coconut, chocolate syrup
instructions: Blend oats into powder-like consistency
Preheat pan or griddle to medium/high heat
Mix blended oats, protein powder, and baking powder
Mash banana and add to powder mix, stir until combined
Whisk eggs separately then gently fold into batter
Spoon batter onto griddle to make 6 medium pancakes
Cook until middles bubble then flip
Top with pomegranate seeds, shredded coconut, chocolate syrup
recipes.summary: A healthy high protein coconut pomegranate pancakes recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Easy Gluten-Free Buckwheat Protein Crepes Recipe
ingredients: 2 tbsp Coconut Oil in liquid form
instructions: In blender, add almond milk, cottage cheese, sea salt, eggs and egg whites, blend 45 seconds
Add buckwheat flour and blend 10 seconds
Refrigerate mixture for 45 minutes before using
After 45 minutes, add coconut oil and blend immediately
Heat nonstick skillet over medium heat
Add quarter cup batter to pan and swirl to distribute evenly
Cook until bottom is browned and can easily be flipped
Cook other side 20-30 seconds
recipes.summary: A healthy easy gluten-free buckwheat protein crepes recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Ground Turkey Omelette Recipe
ingredients: 1 cup of chopped green and red peppers
instructions: In a deep wok or non-stick skillet, add turkey and vegetables and cook in 1 tablespoon of olive oil until soft
In a large mixing bowl whisk the eggs
In an omelette pan, add 2 tablespoons of olive oil and heat
Cook the egg mixture until firm and wrap it around the turkey/vegetable mixture
Serve hot immediately
recipes.summary: A healthy ground turkey omelette recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Healthy High Protein Jumbo Apple Muffin Recipe
ingredients: Liquid Egg Whites (enough to make a thin batter, about 0.5-0.75 cup)
instructions: Mix everything except apple in microwave safe bowl
Let stand for a couple minutes so coconut flour absorbs moisture
Stir then add the apple
Stir again and microwave for 8-9 minutes
recipes.summary: A healthy healthy high protein jumbo apple muffin recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Hearty Pumpkin Spice Protein Waffles Recipe
ingredients: 2 scoops snickerdoodle or vanilla whey protein powder
Additional Pumpkin Pie Spice as desired
instructions: Mix together all ingredients except syrup in a bowl
Allow batter to sit while waffle iron warms
Spray waffle iron with nonstick spray
Cook according to waffle iron directions
recipes.summary: A healthy hearty pumpkin spice protein waffles recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: High Protein Epic Breakfast Burrito Recipe
ingredients: 4 small low carb tortillas OR 2 large low carb tortillas
1/2 cup shredded reduced fat cheddar cheese
instructions: In a bowl, whisk together eggs and egg whites
Spray a skillet with nonstick spray
Scramble eggs over medium heat until desired doneness
Dice up red pepper, green pepper and onion
Remove eggs from pan and cover
Add ground beef and taco seasoning to skillet
Cook beef until done
Lay burrito or tortilla on a plate
Layer scrambled eggs, peppers, onion, ground beef and finish with a sprinkle of cheese
Wrap up and enjoy with a side of fresh fruit!
recipes.summary: A healthy high protein epic breakfast burrito recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: High Protein Cheeseburger Omelette Recipe
instructions: Whisk together eggs and eggwhites
Heat a skillet over medium heat
Add eggs to skillet and cover pan with aluminum foil
Cook until desired doneness
In a second skillet, cook ground beef with salt & pepper
Spread cooked ground beef on one side of eggs
Top ground beef with tomato and pickle
Fold eggs over beef
Sprinkle with cheese
Cook until cheese is slightly melted
Finish off with ketchup and serve
recipes.summary: A healthy high protein cheeseburger omelette recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Joe Ohrablo's Protein Oatmeal Pancakes Recipe
ingredients: 20 grams of carbs from fruit (banana, blueberries or strawberries)
instructions: Mix all ingredients into a pancake batter, adding a tiny bit of water to make it easy to mix
Spray nonstick pan with cooking spray
Cook until brown on each side
Throw on cinnamon for extra taste
Top with sugar free syrup if desired
recipes.summary: A healthy joe ohrablo's protein oatmeal pancakes recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Chocolate Oat Kaged Muscle Kasein Protein Bars
ingredients: 1 scoop Kaged Muscle Kasein vanilla protein powder
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together rolled oats and casein protein powder, set aside
In a medium pan, melt together coconut oil, cocoa powder, and coconut sugar on low heat
Once melted, pour into dry mixture bowl and add vanilla extract and almond milk, mix well
Line a 6x8 inch baking pan with parchment paper
Transfer mixture to pan then place in refrigerator to cool
Remove from refrigerator and cut into 10 squares
recipes.summary: A healthy chocolate oat kaged muscle kasein protein bars from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Kurt Weidner's Sweet Potato Waffles Recipe
instructions: Add all ingredients into a blender
Blend until smooth
Pour mixture into a waffle maker, heat and serve
recipes.summary: A healthy kurt weidner's sweet potato waffles recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Low Carb Berry Cobbler Crumble Recipe
instructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees F
Toss berries with xanthum gum, lemon zest and any sweetener, if using
Put berries in a cast iron skillet or oven safe dish
Bake for 15 minutes
While berries are baking, mix together almond flour, protein powder and 1 tbsp melted coconut oil until crumbly
After 15 minutes, remove berries from oven and top with crumble mixture
Bake 3-5 minutes or until golden
Serve topped with whipped cream or greek yogurt
recipes.summary: A healthy low carb berry cobbler crumble recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Low Carb, High Protein Breakfast Pizza Eggs Recipe
ingredients: Pizza seasoning or Italian Herbs to taste
instructions: Coat a 9 inch skillet with nonstick spray
Whisk together egg, egg whites, zucchini, coconut flour and pizza seasoning
Pour mixture into pan and set over medium heat
Cover pan and cook until eggs are set and edges become slightly golden
Top with pasta sauce and grated cheese
recipes.summary: A healthy low carb, high protein breakfast pizza eggs recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Low Carb Pancakes With Raspberries Recipe
instructions: Mix egg whites and almond flour together
Heat coconut oil in skillet
Pour half of batter into skillet and cook until brown around edges then flip
Cook other side until brown
Repeat with remaining batter
Serve with raspberries
recipes.summary: A healthy low carb pancakes with raspberries recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Monster Mass Turbo Bulking Oatmeal Recipe
ingredients: 4 scoops Monster Mass protein powder, favorite flavor
instructions: Place instant oatmeal in container, add water, heat in microwave
Once heated, stir and let stand 1-2 minutes
Stir in Monster Mass protein and 1 cup of milk
Add 1-3 scoops of instant coffee grounds
Add additional milk if needed for desired consistency
Optional: top with sliced strawberries or banana
recipes.summary: A healthy monster mass turbo bulking oatmeal recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Peanut Butter Chocolate Chip Protein French Toast Recipe
instructions: Preheat pan or griddle to medium/high heat
Whisk together egg, protein powder, cinnamon, and milk
Soak each slice of bread in egg mixture on each side
Cook french toast on each side about 3 minutes or until golden brown
Heat peanut butter until melty
Drizzle over french toast and sprinkle with mini chocolate chips
recipes.summary: A healthy peanut butter chocolate chip protein french toast recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Pumpkin Spice Protein Donuts With Cream Cheese Frosting Recipe
ingredients: FROSTING (optional): 1/2 cup whipped cream cheese, 1/2 tsp liquid stevia
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F
Combine first 7 dry ingredients in a bowl
Combine wet ingredients in a separate bowl and whisk well
Add wet into dry ingredients and mix
Spray 8-10 donut molds with nonstick spray
Evenly divide batter between each donut mold
Bake for approximately 10 minutes or until toothpick comes out clean
While cooling, mix together cream cheese and stevia for frosting
Frost donuts and sprinkle with additional cinnamon
recipes.summary: A healthy pumpkin spice protein donuts with cream cheese frosting recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Red Velvet Protein Pancakes Recipe
ingredients: 2 scoops red velvet or chocolate protein powder
Cream Cheese Frosting: 4 tbsp Greek yogurt cream cheese, 1/4 cup nonfat Greek yogurt, 1 scoop vanilla protein powder, sweetener to taste
instructions: Mix together all frosting ingredients and place in refrigerator
Whisk together dry ingredients: oat flour, protein powder, baking powder, cocoa powder, salt
Whisk together wet ingredients: egg whites, greek yogurt, vanilla, sweetener
Combine wet and dry ingredients
Set nonstick skillet over medium heat
Drop pancake batter into pan in desired size
Allow to cook until small bubbles form on top
Flip and cook additional 1-2 minutes
Repeat until all batter is gone
Remove frosting from refrigerator and layer pancakes with cream cheese mixture
recipes.summary: A healthy red velvet protein pancakes recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Scrambled Eggs With Cheese Recipe
ingredients: 30 grams of shredded low fat mozzarella cheese
instructions: Whisk whole eggs and egg whites in a large mixing bowl
In a small frying pan cook onion and mushrooms until soft
Remove onions and mushrooms and add to the egg mix
Add all other ingredients except shredded cheese
Mix ingredients then add to moderately heated frying pan with olive oil
Stir gently to scramble the eggs
Cook until eggs are done to your liking
Serve on a large plate and sprinkle shredded cheese over the top
recipes.summary: A healthy scrambled eggs with cheese recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Spicy Scrambled Eggs Recipe
ingredients: 2 large whole eggs and 4 egg whites
instructions: Spray a small non-stick frying pan with olive oil cooking spray
Whisk eggs, onion, garlic, chilli, cottage cheese and herbs together in a bowl
Add to moderately heated frying pan and gently stir to scramble
Serve on toast
recipes.summary: A healthy spicy scrambled eggs recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Sundried Tomato & Herb Scrambled Egg Grilled Cheese Recipe
ingredients: 2 tbsp chopped Sun Dried Tomato (not in oil)
2 slices Ezekiel Bread or bread of choice
instructions: Whisk together egg, egg whites, salt and pepper
Add in sun dried tomatoes
Heat a nonstick skillet over medium heat
Scramble eggs until cooked through
Place eggs onto 1 slice of bread
Top with cheese
Place sandwich into skillet and cook until golden
Flip and cook until cheese is melted
recipes.summary: A healthy sundried tomato & herb scrambled egg grilled cheese recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Bodybuilder's Double Beef & Bacon Cheeseburger Recipe
ingredients: 1 slice Reduced Fat White Cheddar Cheese
instructions: Combine ground beef and liquid smoke
Form beef into two even sized patties
Grill until about 1 minute before desired doneness
Add half slice of cheese to each burger and allow to melt
Cook bacon as desired
Place one burger on bottom of roll, followed by bacon, then remaining burger
Add condiments such as lettuce, tomato, ketchup, mustard, relish if desired
recipes.summary: A healthy bodybuilder's double beef & bacon cheeseburger recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: High Protein Chicken Meatballs Recipe
instructions: Start by putting the pan on medium heat and grease lightly so meatballs don't stick
Grate or chop the onion finely
In a large bowl, mix grated onion with rest of ingredients
Make small balls out of the mixture using a spoon to get consistent size (wet hands with cold water keeps mixture from sticking)
Fry the balls until golden brown, cut one ball open to check they are cooked through
recipes.summary: A healthy high protein chicken meatballs recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: High Protein Grilled Chili Cheese Fries Recipe
instructions: Heat grill to medium heat
Layer 3-4 thick pieces of tin foil on top of one another
Place fries in center of foil, top with chili and cheddar cheese
Grill over medium heat with lid closed for about 25-30 minutes until fries are golden and cheese is melted
Serve with 6 forks and enjoy!
recipes.summary: A healthy high protein grilled chili cheese fries recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Crock Pot Turkey Meat Balls With Green Peppers Recipe
ingredients: Cajun seasoning, black pepper, garlic salt to taste
instructions: Cook cauliflower in microwave until very tender, chop into fine pieces and set aside
Thaw green peppers in microwave and set aside
Mix turkey, eggs, coconut flour, Worcestershire sauce, pepper and seasonings
Roll meatballs about the size of a golf ball
Cover bottom of crock pot with meatballs, layer green peppers and cauliflower on them
Continue layering meatballs and pepper and cauliflower mix
Chop cranberry sauce and distribute over meatballs, pour chili sauce over everything
Cover and cook on high for 6-7 hours
recipes.summary: A healthy crock pot turkey meat balls with green peppers recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Damien's Cheap Chili Recipe
instructions: Finely chop garlic, cut onions into slivers and finely chop red pepper
Cook all meat in large deep saucepan until dark brown, stirring constantly
Move meat to large deep pot, add olive oil, garlic and onion, cook until onion is soft
Add can of chopped tomatoes and salsa and simmer 10 minutes until sauce thickens
Add finely chopped peppers and can of corn kernels
Add chili powder to taste and simmer 20-50 mins
recipes.summary: A healthy damien's cheap chili recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Deep Dish Pepperoni Pizza Lasagna Recipe
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees
Combine cottage cheese, eggs, and pizza seasoning in a bowl, mix until creamy and smooth
Spread 1/4 cup pizza sauce on bottom of 9x13 baking dish
Layer 3 noodles on top of sauce
Evenly spread 1/3 of cottage cheese mixture on noodles
Spread sauce on top, sprinkle 1/4 of shredded cheese, layer 1/3 ground turkey and 1/3 pepperoni
Repeat layers two more times
Finish with remaining mozzarella
Cover and bake for 30 minutes until cheese is melted and bubbly
recipes.summary: A healthy deep dish pepperoni pizza lasagna recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Game Day Buffalo Chicken Sliders Recipe
ingredients: 2 lbs boneless skinless chicken breast, cooked and shredded
1/4 cup reduced fat blue cheese dressing
instructions: Combine shredded chicken, wing sauce and ranch seasoning in mixing bowl and toss until coated
Place a small lettuce leaf on each roll
Top with shredded buffalo chicken
Finish off with a drizzle of blue cheese dressing
recipes.summary: A healthy game day buffalo chicken sliders recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Healthy Chili Recipe
ingredients: 2 lbs lean ground beef (80%) or turkey
instructions: Brown ground beef or turkey
Place meat in soup kettle with all ingredients
Season with salt and pepper
Optional additions: diced jalapenos, green chilies, ranch dressing seasoning packet, or salsa
If chili is too thick, add water as needed
Cook until thoroughly heated
recipes.summary: A healthy healthy chili recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Healthy Low Cal Lasagna Recipe
instructions: Cook ground beef until brown
Boil noodles as directed by package
Spray a 9x13 pan with cooking spray and spread a few tablespoons of sauce on the bottom
Mix all ingredients except mozzarella cheese
Lay down half the noodles and top with half the cottage cheese mixture
Layer with the rest of the noodles and top with the other half of the mixture
Put fat free mozzarella cheese on top
Bake at 350F for 35-40 minutes
recipes.summary: A healthy healthy low cal lasagna recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: High Protein Balsamic Steak & Pasta Salad Recipe
ingredients: 8oz high protein pasta (Banza), cooked and drained
Garlic powder, salt and pepper to taste
instructions: Slice steak into thin strips and grill until desired doneness
Toss together cooked pasta, asparagus, tomato, balsamic, and seasonings
Add in cooked steak and goat cheese
Toss gently
Serve immediately or store in a sealed container
recipes.summary: A healthy high protein balsamic steak & pasta salad recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Protein Packed Lean Gains BBQ Sloppy Joe Recipe
ingredients: 0.5 cup crushed tomatoes or pasta sauce
instructions: Heat a nonstick skillet over medium heat
Saute onion, ground beef and turkey until almost cooked through
Add in crushed tomatoes and seasonings
Cook an additional 2 minutes
Serve over roll of choice
recipes.summary: A healthy protein packed lean gains bbq sloppy joe recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: High Protein Cheesy Meatball Sub Recipe
instructions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees
Mix together all meatball ingredients
Shape into desired size meatballs
Bake on lined baking sheet for approximately 13 minutes or until juices run clear
Spread pasta sauce on bottom and top of sub roll
Place meatballs in roll
Top with cheese
Place back in oven to melt cheese
recipes.summary: A healthy high protein cheesy meatball sub recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: High Protein Chicken Burrito Bowl Recipe
ingredients: 1/3 cup no salt added black beans
1/2 cup fresh pico de gallo or salsa
instructions: Toss cooked white rice with chopped cilantro, squeeze of lime juice and a pinch of salt
Toss chicken breast with your favorite Mexican seasoning and bake or grill as desired
Once chicken is done cooking, cut into bite size pieces
Warm your black beans in the microwave
Build your bowl - divide all ingredients between 2 bowls
Layer cilantro lime rice, shredded lettuce, chicken, beans, guacamole, pico de gallo, greek yogurt
Finish off with a sprinkle of cheddar cheese and a wedge of lime
recipes.summary: A healthy high protein chicken burrito bowl recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: High Protein Chicken Caeser Wraps Recipe
instructions: Combine yogurt, mustard, cooked garlic clove and anchovy paste for dressing
Toss and coat romaine lettuce and cucumbers with dressing
Split coated greens into 2 portions and place into tortillas
Add approximately 1.5 oz chicken per tortilla
Wrap up and enjoy
recipes.summary: A healthy high protein chicken caeser wraps recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: High-Protein Chicken & Peanut Black Bean Pasta Recipe
instructions: Combine all sauce ingredients in a bowl
Heat in microwave for 30-45 seconds and mix well
Cook pasta according to directions
Toss cooked pasta, bean sprouts, shredded chicken, and sauce together
Evenly divide between 2 plates
Top with roasted peanuts and fresh chives if desired
recipes.summary: A healthy high-protein chicken & peanut black bean pasta recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: High-Protein Grilled Chicken Gyros Recipe
ingredients: 24 oz chicken breast, cut into cubes
Tzatziki Sauce: 0.5 cup nonfat Greek yogurt, 0.5 tsp dry dill, splash of lemon juice, salt and pepper to taste
instructions: Mix together all Tzatziki sauce ingredients and place in refrigerator
Add chicken, olive oil, vinegar, garlic powder, lemon juice, and oregano to a bag, toss and marinate 2-3 hours or overnight
Remove chicken from container and grill until cooked through
Evenly divide chicken between 8 pitas
Top with tomato, cucumber, onion, and tzatziki sauce
recipes.summary: A healthy high-protein grilled chicken gyros recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Homemade High Protein Spinach & Chicken Pizza Recipe
ingredients: 10 oz cooked and shredded chicken breast
instructions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees F
Bring water and chicken stock to a low boil
Slowly add in cornmeal (add slowly to prevent clumping)
Allow to simmer for several minutes while it thickens
Mix in grated parmesan
Remove from stove and allow to cool slightly
Grease a 9 inch spring form pan or pie dish
Evenly spread cornmeal into dish
Bake at 400 degrees for 10-12 minutes until slightly firm
Remove and add toppings: sauce, spinach, chicken and cheese
Bake an additional 10 minutes until cheese is melted and crust is golden
recipes.summary: A healthy homemade high protein spinach & chicken pizza recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: High Protein Tuna Bake Pasta Recipe
instructions: Boil pasta on medium temperature for 10 mins
Empty both cans of tuna into a large bowl and add spinach, sweetcorn, broccoli and mushrooms, mix well with garlic and herbs
Add drained pasta to bowl and mix again
Add contents of bowl into a level ovenproof dish
Add cheese and black pepper on top
Bake for 15-20 mins in the oven at 200 degrees celsius
Remove from oven when golden color and serve
recipes.summary: A healthy high protein tuna bake pasta recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: High Protein Chipotle Cheddar Vegetarian Quesadilla Recipe
instructions: Add sliced pepper, onion and mushroom to grill pan and grill until tender
Mix together cottage cheese and chipotle seasoning
Lay tortilla flat on grill
Spread half with cottage cheese mixture, add veggies, then top with cheddar cheese
Cook opened with grill cover down for 2 minutes
Fold tortilla over and flip gently
Cook another 1-2 minutes until cheese is melted
Slice and serve with salsa
recipes.summary: A healthy high protein chipotle cheddar vegetarian quesadilla recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Low Carb Chicken Carbonara Recipe
ingredients: Sea salt and pepper to taste
instructions: Preheat oven to 300F
Add oil to saute pan and set on medium-high heat
Season chicken with salt, pepper and Italian seasoning
Sear chicken until golden brown on each side, then move to baking sheet in oven
Deglaze pan with tomatoes, add garlic, mushrooms, and snow peas, saute until fragrant
Deglaze with white wine and cook until evaporated
Add milk and reduce by half, then add arrowroot slurry and thicken
Remove chicken from oven when internal temp reaches 160F, rest until 165F
Toss spaghetti squash into sauce
Serve baked chicken on top of sauced spaghetti squash
recipes.summary: A healthy low carb chicken carbonara recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Low Carb Bacon Cheddar Ranch Potato Salad
instructions: Add cauliflower florets to a large pot and cover with water
Bring to a boil and boil 7-8 minutes until fork tender
Drain cauliflower and set aside
In a bowl combine Greek yogurt, ranch seasoning and salt and pepper
Gently mix yogurt into cauliflower until coated
Mix in shredded cheddar cheese and crumbled bacon
Finish with chives if desired
Serve right away or refrigerate until ready to use
recipes.summary: A healthy low carb bacon cheddar ranch potato salad from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Mediterranean Rice Recipe
instructions: Boil basmati rice for approximately 15-20 minutes
Add rice to bowl
Cut up red onion into strips and add to rice
Drain tuna and add to rice
Cut avocado into small squares and add to rice
Squeeze lemon juice over rice
Add salt and pepper if desired
recipes.summary: A healthy mediterranean rice recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Mexican Style Stuffed Peppers Recipe
ingredients: 4 medium bell peppers, sliced in half and seeded
0.5 cup black beans, drained and rinsed
instructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees
Bring a pot of water to a boil, add peppers and cook 4-5 minutes until tender
Drain and lay cut side up in baking pan
Heat large nonstick skillet over medium heat, add chicken and cook 2-3 minutes
Add remaining ingredients except cheese to chicken, stir and simmer 5 minutes
Evenly divide filling between pepper halves and top with shredded cheese
Cover baking dish with foil and cook for 30-35 minutes until cheese is melted
Serve hot
recipes.summary: A healthy mexican style stuffed peppers recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Nutritious Hot Body Turkey Chili Recipe
ingredients: Himalayan salt and pepper to taste
instructions: Lightly spray frying pan with cooking spray
Add turkey and onions, crumble turkey and cook fully
Stir in remaining ingredients
Cover pot with lid
Continue to cook on low heat for 30 minutes
recipes.summary: A healthy nutritious hot body turkey chili recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Bodybuilders' Steak & Grilled Cheese Sandwich Recipe
ingredients: 2 slices reduced fat pepper jack cheese
8 oz thinly sliced sirloin tip steak
instructions: Season meat and cook as desired
Add peppers and onions to medium skillet and cook until tender
Layer steak, veggies and cheese onto bread
Top with additional bread slice
Heat medium skillet or grill pan over medium heat
Add sandwich to pan and toast until golden
Flip and toast until cheese is fully melted
recipes.summary: A healthy bodybuilders' steak & grilled cheese sandwich recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: The Perfect Curry Tuna Melt (With Jicama Fries!) Recipe
ingredients: Jicama Fries: 1 cup jicama peeled and cut, 2 tsp oil, Cajun seasoning
instructions: Preheat oven to 425
Toss together jicama, oil and seasoning
Spread on baking sheet and bake 20 minutes, toss, bake another 20 minutes until golden
While fries bake, mix together tuna, yogurt, curry spice and chives
Divide tuna evenly between 2 slices of bread
Place a slice of cheese on top of each sandwich
Top with additional slice of bread
Place in oven with fries for last 3 minutes until cheese is melted
Divide fries evenly and serve each with one sandwich
recipes.summary: A healthy the perfect curry tuna melt (with jicama fries!) recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Protein Packed Chili Dog Recipe
ingredients: 8 oz no salt added tomato sauce
instructions: Combine ground turkey, tomato sauce and all seasonings in a pan over medium heat
Cook 3-4 minutes then reduce to medium-low and simmer
While chili simmers, place hot dogs on heated grill and cook until desired temperature
Grill rolls if desired
Place hot dogs into buns
Evenly divide chili among 6 hot dogs
Top with optional toppings such as mustard, cheese, or slaw
recipes.summary: A healthy protein packed chili dog recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Protein Packed Grilled Steak Burrito Recipe
ingredients: 0.5 cup no salt black beans, drained
instructions: Season steak with salt and pepper
Grill steak until desired doneness
Cook brown rice according to package directions
When rice is done, add in pico de gallo and black beans
Layer bean and rice mixture down center of tortilla
Top with sliced steak
Finish off with a dollop of greek yogurt and cheese or avocado if desired
Roll up and enjoy
recipes.summary: A healthy protein packed grilled steak burrito recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Pulled BBQ Chicken Potato Skins Recipe
ingredients: 1 cup reduced fat shredded cheddar cheese
instructions: Preheat oven to 425 degrees
Rinse potatoes and pierce with a fork
Place potatoes on a baking sheet and bake for about 1 hour or until tender
While potatoes are cooking, boil chicken for about 8-10 minutes or until cooked through
When chicken is done, shred it by using 2 forks
Toss the chicken with the BBQ sauce and set aside
When potatoes are done, cut in half and scoop out the middle
Evenly divide the pulled BBQ chicken among the potatoes
Sprinkle with shredded cheddar cheese
Return to the oven and bake an additional 20 minutes until cheese is melted
recipes.summary: A healthy pulled bbq chicken potato skins recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Salsa And Chicken Whole Wheat Pizza Recipe
ingredients: 12 inch whole wheat pizza crust, store bought
8 ounces Mexican four cheese blend, shredded
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees
Spread salsa evenly over pizza crust
Add diced onions, chopped black olives and finely chopped fresh spinach
Top with cheese and cubed chicken
Bake for 12-15 minutes until cheese is melted
Let the pizza rest for several minutes
Cut into 4 slices and serve
recipes.summary: A healthy salsa and chicken whole wheat pizza recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Scallop Cerviche Recipe
ingredients: Juice of 6 limes, enough to cover scallops
instructions: Put the scallops into a shallow bowl and squeeze lime juice over them
Cover and refrigerate for 4-8 hours (overnight is fine)
The acid from the limes cooks the scallops in a process called ceviche
After soaking, remove scallops and drain off most of the remaining lime juice
Dice the onion, tomato, and celery, and add to the scallops
Add capers, salt, olive oil and pepper
Refrigerate for another hour and serve cold
recipes.summary: A healthy scallop cerviche recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Shaun's Chili Recipe
instructions: Chop and cook the onions in some oil for 10 minutes
Brown the meat in batches in a separate pan
When all the meat is done add to a very large pan with the onions
Add in tomatoes, mushrooms, a good amount of puree, kidney beans and chili powder to taste
Reduce heat and leave for a couple hours
Allow to cool then bag up and freeze
Heat in microwave 3 minutes when ready to eat
recipes.summary: A healthy shaun's chili recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Tuna, Avocado and Tomato Recipe
ingredients: 150g pre-cooked cannellini or lima beans, rinsed and drained
instructions: Brush tuna steak with olive oil and grill or dry-fry about 3 mins on each side until outside is golden but inside still pink
Steam or microwave asparagus tips until just tender
Halve tomatoes, squeeze out pips then chop roughly
Arrange beans on serving plates with tomato, asparagus, and onion
Peel and slice avocado, add to plates
Mix together oil, lemon juice, most of oregano and seasoning
Pour most of dressing over salad, slice tuna and add
Drizzle remaining dressing and garnish with rest of oregano
recipes.summary: A healthy tuna, avocado and tomato recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Baked Spinach, Mushroom & Gouda Quiche Recipe
ingredients: 1 cup (112g) shredded gouda or cheese of choice
instructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees
Spray 6 large muffin cups with nonstick spray
Mix together all ingredients
Evenly divide mixture among 6 muffin cups
Bake for approximately 40 minutes or until golden
Allow to cool before removing (they will continue to set)
recipes.summary: A healthy baked spinach, mushroom & gouda quiche recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Beef Chop Suey Recipe
instructions: In a large nonstick frying pan add olive oil and beef, cook until brown. Do not overcook or beef goes tough
In a second pan, add olive oil, cabbage, celery, mushrooms, water chestnuts, soybean, vinegar and onion
Cook until entire mixture is hot and onions have softened
Add soy sauce, beef stock and cooked beef
Cook this mixture for 5-10 minutes
recipes.summary: A healthy beef chop suey recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Bodybuilders Lean Beef Enchiladas Recipes
ingredients: 0.25 cup no salt added black beans, drained and rinsed
0.25 cup red or green enchilada sauce
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F
In a skillet over medium heat, saute ground beef until cooked
Add diced chiles, salt and pepper
Transfer meat to a bowl and add in beans
Spread half the enchilada sauce on bottom of an oven safe dish
Divide the meat and bean mixture evenly down the middle of the 3 tortillas
Sprinkle with half the cheese
Roll up tightly and place seam side down in the dish
Spread remaining enchilada sauce on top
Sprinkle with remaining cheese
Bake for 10-12 minutes
recipes.summary: A healthy bodybuilders lean beef enchiladas recipes from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Braised Beef Blumenberg With Mushrooms And Cauliflower Recipe
instructions: In a large heavy stew pot add coconut oil, heat on high
Brown beef in batches until all liquid has evaporated and drippings look very dark and caramelized
Return all browned beef to pan, add onions and celery, cook until onions turn transparent
Add water to cover the beef
Add mushrooms and cauliflower cut into chunks
Season with Lawry's salt and pepper
Add enough water to just cover all ingredients
Bring to a boil then cover and turn heat to low
Cook covered for approximately 1.5 hours until liquid is reduced and meat is tender
recipes.summary: A healthy braised beef blumenberg with mushrooms and cauliflower recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Cheesy Baked Eggplant Recipe
ingredients: Oregano, Italian seasoning, basil, thyme to taste
instructions: Peel and cut eggplant into slices
Liberally apply salt. Let sit 30 minutes
Soak up liquid with paper towel. Rinse thoroughly
Cut slices into quarters
Place one layer in bottom of 9x13 baking pan
Cover with half can diced tomato and one can tomato sauce
Place cheese slices over layer. Season as desired. Repeat
Bake at 350 for 45 minutes or until eggplant is as desired
recipes.summary: A healthy cheesy baked eggplant recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Grilled Chipotle Salmon with Black Beans & Mango Salsa Recipe
ingredients: 4 pieces coho salmon fillets approximately 1.5 lbs total
instructions: Mix together honey and lime juice
Spread honey evenly between 4 fillets
Sprinkle with chipotle seasoning as desired
Grill salmon until cooked and flaky
Toss together black beans and salsa
Evenly divide over 4 fillets
Serve warm
recipes.summary: A healthy grilled chipotle salmon with black beans & mango salsa recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Grilled Sausage and Turkey Flatbread Pizza Recipe
ingredients: 0.25 cup assorted colored bell peppers, sliced
instructions: Heat grill to around 300 degrees
Place each flatbread top side down and grill until crispy
While bread is grilling, cook ground turkey breast in a skillet until cooked through
Once bread is crispy, flip over and top each flatbread with half the sauce, ground turkey, sausage, bell peppers and cheese
Close grill cover and continue to grill until cheese is melted
Enjoy right away!
recipes.summary: A healthy grilled sausage and turkey flatbread pizza recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Healthy High Protein Chicken Parmesan Meatloaf Recipe
ingredients: 1 lb ground chicken breast or turkey
instructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees
In a large bowl combine ground chicken, onion, garlic, egg, oats, 1/4 cup pasta sauce, Italian seasoning, salt and pepper
Mix until combined
Shape mixture into a loaf shape and place on lined baking sheet
Bake for approximately 45 minutes
Remove from oven
Top with remaining pasta sauce and mozzarella cheese
Put back in oven until cheese is melted
Allow to sit 10 minutes then serve
recipes.summary: A healthy healthy high protein chicken parmesan meatloaf recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: High Protein Sriracha Chicken Cheese Fries Recipe
ingredients: 4 medium white or sweet potatoes, cut as desired
instructions: Preheat oven to 425 degrees
Coat oven safe pan with nonstick spray
Add potato slices to pan
Bake for approximately 20 minutes
While potatoes are baking, boil chicken until cooked through
Shred cooked chicken
Toss chicken with sriracha sauce
Remove fries from oven
Top with shredded chicken and cheese
Place back in oven about 6-7 minutes until cheese melts
Top with chives if desired
recipes.summary: A healthy high protein sriracha chicken cheese fries recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: High Protein Cheesy Steak Pizza Recipe
ingredients: 1 cup reduced fat shredded mozzarella cheese
instructions: Slice steak into thin strips and grill or saute until desired doneness
Preheat oven to 375 degrees
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and place pizza crust on top
Top crust with pizza sauce, half the cheese, peppers, onions, and grilled steak
Finish with remaining cheese
Bake for about 15 minutes until golden and bubbly
Allow to cool slightly, slice and serve
recipes.summary: A healthy high protein cheesy steak pizza recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Homemade High Protein White Cheddar Mac & Cheese Recipe
instructions: Preheat oven to 420 degrees
Cook pasta 2 minutes shy of directions
Drain pasta and return to pot
Add milk, seasonings, cottage cheese and Greek yogurt to pasta
Slowly mix in white cheddar cheese and half of parmesan
Pour pasta into an oven safe baking dish
Sprinkle with 2 tbsp of oat bran and remaining parmesan cheese
Bake until golden and bubbly
recipes.summary: A healthy homemade high protein white cheddar mac & cheese recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Honey BBQ Slow Cooker Chicken Wings Recipe
instructions: Preheat oven to 450 degrees
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper, place chicken wings on sheet and cook 10 minutes
While baking, spray slow cooker with nonstick spray, add half the BBQ sauce to the bottom
When wings are done, add to slow cooker, top with remaining BBQ sauce
Cook on high heat 2-3 hours or low heat 4-5 hours
Mix together cornstarch and water, 15 minutes before wings are done add cornstarch mixture and toss to coat
Allow the wings to finish cooking and the sauce to thicken
Serve piping hot
recipes.summary: A healthy honey bbq slow cooker chicken wings recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Lemon-Thyme Roast Chicken Recipe
ingredients: Six 4-inch fresh thyme sprigs or 2 tsp dried thyme leaves
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F
Sprinkle chicken cavities with pepper and salt
Roll lemons pressing lightly until softened, pierce each lemon 15 times about 1 inch deep
Place pierced lemons, 5 garlic cloves and thyme into large cavity of chicken, place remaining garlic into small cavity
Truss chicken. Sprinkle evenly with remaining pepper and salt
Place chicken breast-side up onto rack in large roasting pan
Roast 2 to 2.25 hours until chicken is cooked through and juices run clear
Remove from oven, let stand 10 minutes
Remove and discard skin, carve chicken and serve garnished with additional thyme sprigs
recipes.summary: A healthy lemon-thyme roast chicken recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Mini Turkey Cheddar & Peppers Quiche Recipe
ingredients: 12 oz Italian seasoned lean ground turkey
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Cook turkey as directed on package
Beat eggs, milk and black pepper in large bowl with whisk
Stir in turkey, cheese and veggies
Line muffin tin with parchment paper
Evenly distribute 0.25 cup of mixture in 16 tins
Bake for 26-30 minutes or until set
Allow quiche to cool for five minutes before serving
recipes.summary: A healthy mini turkey cheddar & peppers quiche recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Protein Packed Sweet Potato Shepherds Pie
instructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees
Add ground beef to a non stick skillet
Cook over medium heat
Once cooked, add in tomato paste, frozen veggies and seasonings as desired
Place mixture into a 9x13in oven safe dish
Spread mashed sweet potatoes over top
Sprinkle with paprika, if desired
Bake for approximately 35-40 minutes
Serve immediately
recipes.summary: A healthy protein packed sweet potato shepherds pie from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Simple Low Carb Orange Chicken Recipe
ingredients: 6 tbsp sugar free orange marmalade or jelly
1 tbsp soy sauce or coconut aminos for gluten free
instructions: Cut chicken breast into bite size pieces
Heat a nonstick skillet over medium heat
Add in chicken breast and cook 1-2 minutes
Sprinkle in onion powder and garlic powder and continue to cook
While chicken is cooking, mix together orange marmalade, soy sauce and apple cider vinegar
Once chicken is cooked, turn down heat and add in sauce
Toss chicken in sauce to coat
Cover and allow sauce to thicken
Serve in lettuce cups, over brown rice or cauliflower rice
Sprinkle with sesame seeds if desired
recipes.summary: A healthy simple low carb orange chicken recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Swedish Beef Patties With Onions Recipe
instructions: Mash the potatoes and mix with the ground beef
Add salt, pepper and water, work the meat mixture until smooth and shape into patties
Heat a skillet with 1 tbsp butter, add the onions and cook over moderate heat until golden brown
Transfer onions to a platter and keep hot
Melt remaining butter in skillet and cook the patties over moderate heat until brown on both sides and cooked throughout
Serve patties with sauteed onions and vegetables of your choice
recipes.summary: A healthy swedish beef patties with onions recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Holiday Season Sweet Potato Casserole Recipe
ingredients: 3 lbs sweet potato, peeled and cut
instructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees
Place sweet potatoes in a sauce pan, cover with water and boil until fork tender
Drain potatoes and return to pot
Add Greek yogurt and seasonings to potatoes, mix with a hand mixer
Add in melted butter and egg whites, beat well
Transfer potatoes to a lightly greased 9x13 casserole dish
Bake for 30 minutes
Remove from oven and top with pecans and marshmallows
Return to oven and bake additional 10 minutes until marshmallows are lightly browned
recipes.summary: A healthy holiday season sweet potato casserole recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Half Pound Teriyaki Turkey Burger Recipe
instructions: Mix together ground turkey breast and 2 tablespoons teriyaki sauce
Heat grill to medium
Place burgers on hot grill
Grill for about 7-9 minutes depending on desired temperature
Flip and cook an additional 7-9 minutes
While burgers cook on second side, place pineapple rings on grill and cook 2 minutes each side
Layer roll with lettuce, turkey burger, additional 1 tablespoon teriyaki sauce per burger and grilled pineapple
recipes.summary: A healthy half pound teriyaki turkey burger recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Turkey Sausage Frittata With Egg Whites Recipe
instructions: Brown sausage in pan while thawing broccoli in the microwave
Mix together and season to taste
Place in 9x11 baking dish
Pour egg whites over almost to cover
Bake at 350-375 for approximately 40 minutes
recipes.summary: A healthy turkey sausage frittata with egg whites recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Amoretti Easy Banana Nut Protein Shake Recipe
ingredients: 8-12 oz unsweetened soy or cashew milk
1 scoop vegan or whey protein powder
instructions: Add all ingredients to blender in order listed
Blend until smooth
Drink and enjoy
recipes.summary: A healthy amoretti easy banana nut protein shake recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Antoine Vaillant's Anabolic Tropic Protein Shake Recipe
ingredients: 3.5 scoops weight gainer protein powder (Real Gains or similar)
instructions: Add coconut water into blender
Add a fistful each of mangos and strawberries, and one banana
Add ice liberally
Add 3.5 scoops of weight gainer protein powder
Blend until smooth
Sip slowly and enjoy
recipes.summary: A healthy antoine vaillant's anabolic tropic protein shake recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Banana, Cinnamon and Peanut Butter Protein Shake Recipe
instructions: Put all ingredients in a blender
Blend for a minute
Enjoy!
recipes.summary: A healthy banana, cinnamon and peanut butter protein shake recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Jen Jewell's Bikini Booty Protein Smoothie Recipe
ingredients: 1 serving greens supplement or 2 cups spinach
instructions: Add protein powder to blender
Add greens supplement or spinach
Add chia seeds
Add frozen raspberries
Add almond milk
Blend for 5-10 seconds and enjoy!
recipes.summary: A healthy jen jewell's bikini booty protein smoothie recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Chocolate Banana Berry Protein Shake Recipe
instructions: Place all ingredients into a blender
Blend until smooth
Serve immediately
recipes.summary: A healthy chocolate banana berry protein shake recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Chocolate Caramel And Coffee Protein Shake Recipe
instructions: Place 8 ounces of brewed coffee and 8 ounces of milk into a shaker cup
Add 2 tablespoons of caramel creamer
Add 2 scoops of chocolate whey protein powder
Shake well and drink
recipes.summary: A healthy chocolate caramel and coffee protein shake recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Cookies And Cream High Calorie Bulking Milkshake Recipe
ingredients: 2 scoops cookies and cream protein powder
instructions: Make whipped topping: whip 8 oz heavy cream until soft peaks form, fold in crumbled Oreo
Store whipped topping mixture (use as 4 servings)
For the shake: place 12 oz whole milk in shaker
Add 2 oz heavy cream and 2 scoops cookies and cream protein powder
Shake well and top with whipped cream topping
recipes.summary: A healthy cookies and cream high calorie bulking milkshake recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Nichole Ohrablo's Super Shake Recipe
instructions: Add all ingredients to blender
Blend until smooth
Serve and enjoy
recipes.summary: A healthy nichole ohrablo's super shake recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: No Powder, No Problem - Tuna Protein Shake Recipe
ingredients: 1 can of Tuna, packed in water, drained
instructions: Don't fear the tuna shake! Combine all ingredients in a blender, and blend until extremely smooth.
recipes.summary: A healthy no powder, no problem - tuna protein shake recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Peanut Butter Banana Bulking Protein Shake Recipe
instructions: Place ingredients into a blender and blend until smooth.
recipes.summary: A healthy peanut butter banana bulking protein shake recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Banana Chocolate Chip Protein Bars Recipe
instructions: Sift together protein powder and coconut flour
Add in vanilla extract, stevia and almond milk
Mix until a dough is formed
Mix in chocolate chips
Evenly divide dough and shape into desired size bars
Store in a sealed container
recipes.summary: A healthy banana chocolate chip protein bars recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Banana Walnut Protein Bars Recipe
instructions: In a large bowl, add all dry ingredients (oats, protein, walnuts, cinnamon) and stir
In a separate bowl, mash bananas and add egg whites and vanilla and stir
Pour wet ingredients into dry ingredients and combine until evenly mixed
Scoop mixture into a 9x9 Pyrex dish
Bake at 350 degrees F for 15 minutes
Allow to cool before cutting
recipes.summary: A healthy banana walnut protein bars recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Chocolate And Peanut Butter Protein Bars Recipe
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F
Place oats in blender and pulse until flour-like texture
Mix oat flour, cinnamon and chocolate whey protein in a bowl
Add peanut butter and mix thoroughly
Mash bananas and add with honey and egg whites, mix well
Add skim milk and mix again
Pour batter into greased 9x9 or 9x13 baking pan
Bake 15-20 minutes until toothpick comes out clean
Allow to cool and cut into 6 bars
recipes.summary: A healthy chocolate and peanut butter protein bars recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Cinnamon Chip Caramel Protein Bars Recipe
ingredients: 4 scoops vanilla caramel whey protein powder
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees
Line a 9x13 inch pan with parchment paper
Combine all dry ingredients in a bowl (protein, oats, cinnamon and salt)
Mix together all wet ingredients (milk, almond butter, honey and extract)
Combine wet and dry ingredients
Stir in cinnamon chips
Pour into baking dish
Bake for approximately 15 minutes
Remove from oven and allow to cool (bars will finish setting)
Slice into desired size bars
Store in a sealed container
recipes.summary: A healthy cinnamon chip caramel protein bars recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: High Protein Fruit & Yogurt Squares Recipe
instructions: Place fruit into separate bowls and microwave each for 90 seconds
Add 0.5 cup Greek yogurt, 1 tsp honey and half a scoop of protein into each bowl and stir
Line a baking tray with parchment paper and layer the mixture on
Top with shredded coconut and cover with cling film
Freeze for 2 hours and enjoy immediately or store in freezer
recipes.summary: A healthy high protein fruit & yogurt squares recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Home Made Protein and Carbohydrate Bar Recipe
ingredients: 1 tsp cake flavoring matching protein powder flavor
0.5 lb (227g) raisins or chopped apple and chopped nuts
instructions: Mix all ingredients together as you add them
Spread the mixture in an oven tray lined with greaseproof paper
Before baking, cut them into 10 squares with a knife
Put in a preheated oven at 325 degrees until lightly browned (about 15 minutes)
Store in an airtight container
recipes.summary: A healthy home made protein and carbohydrate bar recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Chocolate Peanut Butter Kaged Muscle Kasein Balls
ingredients: 2 cups pitted packed soft Medjool dates
1 scoop Kaged Muscle Kasein chocolate protein powder
Chocolate Coating: 1 cup unsweetened dark chocolate finely chopped, 1.5 tbsp coconut oil
Peanut Butter Drizzle: 3 tbsp natural peanut butter, 1 tbsp coconut oil, 0.5 tbsp maple syrup
instructions: Process dates in food processor until smooth. Add peanut butter, vanilla, protein powder and salt, process 30 seconds
Transfer mixture to freezer for 30 minutes to set
Remove from freezer, scoop tablespoons of mixture, roll into 1-inch balls, place on lined baking sheet
Freeze balls 15 minutes to set
Melt chocolate and coconut oil in a double boiler until smooth
Spoon tablespoon of chocolate mixture over each ball, freeze 15 minutes
Whisk peanut butter, coconut oil and maple syrup in double boiler until smooth
Drizzle balls with peanut butter mixture and serve
recipes.summary: A healthy chocolate peanut butter kaged muscle kasein balls from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: No-Bake Gluten-Free High Protein Energy Bites Recipe
ingredients: 2 Tbsp Maple Syrup or Raw Honey
instructions: In large bowl, combine oats, ground chia, hemp seeds, cacao powder, protein powder, cinnamon and sea salt
Add in almond butter, maple syrup, vanilla and optional mix-ins, mix until just combined
Scoop 1 tbsp of mixture and roll between hands into ball
Place on cookie sheet and repeat until all mixture is used (makes about 20-28)
Place cookie sheet in refrigerator for about 30 minutes to set
Store in airtight container in refrigerator for up to 1 week
recipes.summary: A healthy no-bake gluten-free high protein energy bites recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Strawberry Protein Bars With Raisins Recipe
ingredients: 4 scoops strawberry flavored whey protein powder
instructions: Combine all ingredients in a bowl and mix well
Spread in a 9x9 baking pan lined with parchment paper
Place in refrigerator and allow to set overnight
Cut into 6 equal squares
recipes.summary: A healthy strawberry protein bars with raisins recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Whey, Honey And Peanut Butter Protein Bar Recipe
instructions: Combine honey and peanut butter in a microwave safe bowl
Microwave in 20-second intervals, stirring each time, until soft enough to mix
Mix in whey protein powder and oats
Spread mixture into a greased 9x9 or 9x13 pan lined with parchment paper
Place pan in fridge for one hour
Remove, cut into 8 squares, and enjoy
recipes.summary: A healthy whey, honey and peanut butter protein bar recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: White Chocolate Peppermint Protein Bars Recipe
instructions: Sift together coconut flour and protein powder
In a separate bowl, melt coconut oil
Add peanut butter and honey to melted coconut oil and mix until combined
Add dry ingredients to wet ingredients and mix well
Line a dish with parchment paper
Evenly spread mixture into pan
Sprinkle with crushed peppermint and lightly press into top of bars
Place in refrigerator to set
Remove and cut into desired size pieces
Store in refrigerator until ready to enjoy
recipes.summary: A healthy white chocolate peppermint protein bars recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: 3 Ingredient Chocolate Protein Mug Cake Recipe
ingredients: 1/2 tsp baking powder for oven option
instructions: Mix all ingredients in a large mug. Do not fill to the lid as it might spill over
Microwave for 1-2 minutes
Let cool before removing and enjoy
recipes.summary: A healthy 3 ingredient chocolate protein mug cake recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Chocolate Peanut Butter Cup Protein Mugcake
ingredients: 1 scoop peanut butter cup protein powder
6 tbsp pumpkin puree or Greek yogurt or applesauce or mashed banana
instructions: Mix flour, protein powder, cocoa powder, sweetener and baking powder
Add egg, pumpkin puree and milk to bowl and gently mix until well combined
Spray a large mug with cooking spray and pour batter into mug
Microwave for 2 minutes, cooking time may vary
Top cake with natural peanut butter, mini peanut butter cup and mini chocolate chips
recipes.summary: A healthy chocolate peanut butter cup protein mugcake from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Chocolate High Protein Pudding Pie Recipe
ingredients: 1 small box sugar free instant chocolate pudding
1 reduced fat graham cracker pie crust
instructions: Combine pudding mix, protein powder and Greek yogurt in a mixing bowl
Mix with an electric hand mixer
Evenly spread into pie crust
Refrigerate for 4-6 hours or overnight
Finish off with whipped topping if desired
recipes.summary: A healthy chocolate high protein pudding pie recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Triple Chocolate Chip Deep Dish Protein Cookie Recipe
ingredients: Optional toppings: ice cream, additional chocolate peanut butter for drizzling
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F
Combine all ingredients except chocolate chips in a bowl
Using an electric mixer, mix well
Gently fold in chocolate chips
Pour batter into an 8 inch oven safe skillet (cast iron skillet works best)
Bake for approximately 20 minutes or until top is golden
Allow to sit 5-10 minutes to finish cooking
Top with ice cream and additional chocolate peanut butter if desired
recipes.summary: A healthy triple chocolate chip deep dish protein cookie recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: High Protein Strawberry Shortcake Recipe
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F
Spray 4 large muffin cups with nonstick spray
Whisk together dry ingredients: oat flour, protein powder and baking soda
Add in egg whites and sweetener if using
Allow batter to sit for 5 minutes
Evenly divide batter between 4 muffin cups
Bake for about 7 minutes
While shortcakes are baking, dice strawberries
When shortcakes are done, allow to cool 5 minutes
Using a knife, cut the top off the muffin and scoop out a bit of the middle to create a cup shape
Fill cake with Greek yogurt and top with strawberries and whipped cream if desired
recipes.summary: A healthy high protein strawberry shortcake recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Simple & Creamy Protein Tiramisu Recipe
instructions: In a large bowl combine Greek yogurt, protein powder, vanilla and stevia
Mix using an electric hand mixer for 45-60 seconds until protein is fully combined
Soak lady fingers one at a time in coffee and place on bottom of 8x8 baking dish. Repeat using 1/3 of the cookies
Top cookies with 1/3 of Greek yogurt mixture, 1 tsp ground cinnamon and 1 tsp cocoa powder
Repeat for 2 additional layers
Top the final layer of Greek yogurt with shaved dark chocolate
Place in refrigerator overnight to fully set
recipes.summary: A healthy simple & creamy protein tiramisu recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Easy Chocolate Protein Brownie Recipe
ingredients: 0.5 scoop chocolate mass gainer protein powder
instructions: Preheat oven to 350F and grease a muffin pan
Melt butter in microwave-safe bowl until entirely melted, do not overheat
Gradually stir coconut sugar into melted butter until very smooth
Crack eggs one at a time into mixture while vigorously stirring until smooth
Gradually add cocoa powder, protein powder and almond flour, constantly stirring
Pour brownie batter evenly into muffin pan (approximately 9 brownies)
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until top layer starts to crack
Remove from oven, place on cooling rack and allow to cool
recipes.summary: A healthy easy chocolate protein brownie recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Double Chocolate Protein Avocado Brownies Recipe
ingredients: 1 scoop Kaged Muscle Kasein protein powder
instructions: Line an 8 x 8 pan with parchment paper, spray, and preheat oven to 350F.
Melt 2 oz of the dark chocolate in microwave.
In food processor, add the avocados, coconut sugar, instant coffee, and vanilla extract. Process until smooth.
Add the eggs and mix until smooth.
Bake at 350F for 30-35 minutes.
recipes.summary: Recipes Snacks High Protein Vegetarian

recipes.title: Crustless Low-Carb Protein Pumpkin Pie Recipe
instructions: Preheat oven to 325 degrees.
Spray a pie dish with nonstick spray.
Add all ingredients to a bowl and mix well.
Bake for ~45-50 minutes or until just set.
Place in refrigerator to set for 4-6 hours.
recipes.summary: Recipes Snacks High Protein Low Carb

recipes.title: Madras Chicken & Broccoli Skewers With Sweet Potato Fries Recipe
ingredients: 2 lbs chicken breast, cut into chunks
4 medium sweet potatoes, cut into wedges
instructions: Combine chicken, broccoli and Madras seasoning in a bowl
Cover and allow to sit for 20 minutes in refrigerator
While meat is marinating, heat up grill and season sweet potato wedges with paprika
Thread chicken cubes and broccoli onto skewers
Place skewers and sweet potatoes on grill
Cook skewers until chicken is cooked through and sweet potatoes are tender
recipes.summary: A healthy madras chicken & broccoli skewers with sweet potato fries recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Protein Packed Chocolate Ice Cream Sandwiches Recipe
ingredients: 2 scoops Quest Nutrition Chocolate Protein Powder
instructions: - Mix together greek yogurt and protein powder.
- Break graham crackers in half.
- Spread greek yogurt mixture evenly between 6 half sheets.
- Top with other half of graham cracker.
- Place in freezer for a minimum of 2 hours.
recipes.summary: Recipes Snacks High Protein Vegetarian

recipes.title: Protein-Packed Smoky Bison Chili Recipe
ingredients: 1 lb ground bison (can sub ground beef or turkey)
1 can kidney beans, drained and rinsed
0.25 to 0.75 cup water or beef broth
instructions: Coat bottom of large pot with oil or nonstick spray
Saute chopped onion, garlic, and bacon for 2 minutes until onion becomes slightly translucent
Add in bison and cook 3-4 minutes
Add in fire roasted tomatoes, tomato sauce and all seasonings
Simmer 2-3 minutes
Stir in unflavored protein powder
Mix in kidney beans
Add water or broth until desired thickness
Add in liquid smoke
Allow to simmer 30 minutes
Serve topped with Greek yogurt, shredded cheddar and fresh chives
recipes.summary: A healthy protein-packed smoky bison chili recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Low-Fat, High-Protein Vegetarian BBQ Cobb Salad Recipe
ingredients: 0.5 cup low-sodium black beans, drained and rinsed
instructions: Cook TVP according to package directions
Mix TVP with BBQ sauce
Add lettuce and veggies to salad bowl
Top with TVP and BBQ mixture
Top with salad dressing of choice or additional BBQ sauce
recipes.summary: A healthy low-fat, high-protein vegetarian bbq cobb salad recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Protein Pumpkin Pancakes With Oats Recipe
ingredients: Topping: 2 tsp peanut flour mixed with water until syrupy
instructions: Blend the eggs, protein powder, oats and pumpkin together until smooth
Cook like pancakes on a nonstick griddle over medium heat
Flip when bubbles form on surface
Mix peanut flour with water to make syrupy topping
Serve topped with peanut flour syrup
recipes.summary: A healthy protein pumpkin pancakes with oats recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Thai Spiced Chicken Recipe
ingredients: Lime wedges and salad greens to serve
instructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees F
Put chicken in a shallow dish in one layer
Blend a third of the yogurt, the curry paste and 3 tbsp of cilantro, season well with salt and pour over chicken, turning pieces until evenly coated
Leave for at least 10 minutes or in fridge overnight
Lift chicken onto a rack in a roasting tin and roast for 35-40 minutes until golden
Blend together remaining yogurt and cilantro, finely chop cucumber and stir into yogurt mixture, season
Serve with the chicken and garnish with lime wedges and salad greens
recipes.summary: A healthy thai spiced chicken recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Low-Carb Grilled Greek Turkey Cutlets & Fresh Green Beans Recipe
instructions: Saute green beans in olive oil over medium heat until tender
Toss with salt and pepper to taste
Grill turkey cutlets until cooked through
Divide cutlets among plates
Sprinkle cutlets with olives, feta, tomato and fresh mint if desired
Serve with green beans
recipes.summary: A healthy low-carb grilled greek turkey cutlets & fresh green beans recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Low Carb, High Protein Pizza Crust Recipe
instructions: Bring cream cheese to room temperature. Preheat oven to 350 degrees
Combine cream cheese, eggs and seasoning in a mixing bowl
Spray a 9x13 baking pan with nonstick spray
Place parmesan cheese evenly on the bottom of the pan
Pour egg and cream cheese mixture over parmesan
Bake for 15-25 minutes until top starts to brown
Pull crust out of oven, add your favorite pizza toppings
Place back in oven and bake for 12-15 more minutes
recipes.summary: A healthy low carb, high protein pizza crust recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Spicy Garlic Bok Choy Recipe
instructions: Combine everything but the bok choy in a large mixing bowl and whisk
Dredge the bok choy through the sauce and place it into a large baking pan
Spoon any excess sauce over the bok choy in the pan
Bake for 20 minutes at 350 degrees and enjoy
recipes.summary: A healthy spicy garlic bok choy recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Baked Apple Cider Pronuts (Protein Donuts) Recipe
instructions: Preheat oven to 330 degrees.
Mix dry and wet ingredients together.
Divide batter between 6 donut molds.
Bake for ~12 minutes.
recipes.summary: A healthy baked apple cider pronuts (protein donuts) recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Blueberry Mug Cake Recipe With FitMiss Vanilla Chai
instructions: Blend all ingredients except blueberries until smooth.
Spray a bowl with non-stick oil, pour in batter.
Stir in blueberries.
Microwave for 2 minutes.
Pour frosting over cake.
recipes.summary: A healthy blueberry mug cake recipe with fitmiss vanilla chai from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Delicious & Easy Café Cream Protein Truffles Recipe
ingredients: 2/3 Scoop Nutriforce Sports Cafe Cream Protein
3 tbsp. Sweet Spreads Chocolate Brownie Coconutter
instructions: Mix all ingredients except CocoNutter.
Shape into truffle bites.
Roll each truffle into melted CocoNutter.
Refrigerate for about 1 hour.
recipes.summary: A healthy delicious & easy café cream protein truffles recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Chocolate Peanut Butter Protein Bark Recipe
ingredients: 1 scoop peanut butter marshmallow protein powder
instructions: Add all ingredients except chocolate peanut butter to a blender.
Mix well.
Spread on parchment paper.
Drizzle peanut butter on top.
Freeze overnight.
Break into pieces.
recipes.summary: Recipes Snacks High Protein Vegetarian

recipes.title: Healthy, Tasty Almond Butter Cookie Recipe
ingredients: 1/2 cup Nuts N More Almond Butter
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Mix together all ingredients.
Bake for ~8 minutes.
recipes.summary: A healthy healthy, tasty almond butter cookie recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Healthy Chocolate Peanut Butter Protein Brownies Recipe
ingredients: Frosting: 1 cup Greek yogurt, 2 tbsp peanut butter flavored protein powder, sweetener if desired
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees
Line an 8x8 baking pan with parchment paper
Combine all brownie ingredients
Pour batter into pan
Bake for approximately 25 minutes (do not overbake)
Remove brownies from oven and allow to cool
While brownies are cooling, mix together all frosting ingredients
Once brownies are fully cooled, frost
Drizzle with chocolate peanut butter
recipes.summary: A healthy healthy chocolate peanut butter protein brownies recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Healthy High Protein Cinnamon Coffee Cake Recipe
ingredients: 1 scoop Muscle Gauge Nutrition Cinnamon Whey Isolate
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 F. Blend all ingredients together. Pour into 2 greased ramekins. Sprinkle cinnamon on top. Bake for 20-25 minutes.
recipes.summary: A healthy healthy high protein cinnamon coffee cake recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Quick & Easy Protein Brown Rice Pudding Recipe
instructions: Combine brown rice, almond milk, butter, cinnamon and vanilla in a medium pot.
Bring to a slow simmer.
Add protein powder and remaining milk.
Mix over low heat until thick and creamy.
Serve warm or refrigerate.
recipes.summary: Recipes Snacks High Protein Vegetarian

recipes.title: Kurt Weidner's Saturday Blueberry Muffins Recipe
instructions: Combine the oats, egg whites and blueberries. Mix evenly. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes. After muffins cool, top with peanut butter.
recipes.summary: A healthy kurt weidner's saturday blueberry muffins recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Low Calorie Chocolate Protein Cupcakes Recipe
instructions: Preheat oven to 325 degrees F.
Mix protein powder and baking powder.
Add in egg whites, coconut oil, milk, applesauce.
Divide batter between 12 cupcake liners.
Bake for ~7 minutes.
recipes.summary: A healthy low calorie chocolate protein cupcakes recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Peach Mango Protein Soft Serve Recipe
instructions: Add protein powder and greek yogurt to food processor.
Blend until combined.
Add in frozen fruit.
Pulse until combined.
Serve immediately.
recipes.summary: A healthy peach mango protein soft serve recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Snickerdoodle Pecan Protein French Toast Sticks
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
Cut each slice of bread into thirds.
Whisk together egg whites, milk, protein powder.
Coat each slice of bread in the egg mixture.
Bake for 9 minutes, flip, bake 9 more minutes.
recipes.summary: Recipes Breakfast Snacks High Protein Vegetarian

recipes.title: Rich Knapp's Peanut Butter Cookies Recipe
instructions: Mix flour, protein powder, salt and baking soda and set aside
Mix applesauce and peanut butter
Add honey and mix well
Add egg whites and beat well
Stir flour mixture into peanut butter mixture
Drop dough from teaspoon onto greased baking sheet and flatten
Bake at 375 degrees for 10 to 15 minutes until lightly browned
recipes.summary: A healthy rich knapp's peanut butter cookies recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Scivation Whey Cupcakes Recipe by Debi
ingredients: 4 scoops of Scivation Whey, any flavor
instructions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees F. Place 4 scoops of Scivation Whey Protein into a mixing bowl. Add 7 oz water or coffee. Mix until smooth. Scoop into baking cups. Bake for 15 min and let stand until cool.
recipes.summary: A healthy scivation whey cupcakes recipe by debi from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: White Chocolate Strawberry Coconut Protein Truffles Recipe
ingredients: 2.5 scoops Nutriforce Sports Strawberry Protein Powder
instructions: Mix dry ingredients together.
Combine honey and coconut oil and heat until melted.
Combine wet and dry ingredients.
Chill for 30 minutes.
Roll into truffles and coat with melted white chocolate.
Refrigerate until set.
recipes.summary: A healthy white chocolate strawberry coconut protein truffles recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Chocolate Peanut Butter Protein Granola Recipe
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
Mix dry ingredients then add wet ingredients.
Spread onto baking sheet.
Bake for 12 minutes, stir, bake 10 more minutes.
Allow to cool and store in sealed container.
recipes.summary: A healthy chocolate peanut butter protein granola recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Lentil Beans (Indian style) - aka Dhal Soup Recipe
instructions: Melt butter in a saucepan and add garlic and onion for 2 minutes while stirring
Add the spices and stir
Put in tomatoes, red lentils, lemon juice, vegetable stock and coconut milk
Bring to a boil
Reduce heat and simmer for 25-30 minutes until lentils are cooked
Season with salt and pepper
Add cilantro and additional lemon juice to add more flavor
recipes.summary: A healthy lentil beans (indian style) - aka dhal soup recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Protein Gingerbread Men Cookie Recipe
instructions: Combine dry ingredients in a mixing bowl.
Whisk together molasses, coconut oil and egg.
Combine wet and dry ingredients.
Chill dough 30 minutes.
Roll, cut, and bake at 375F for 8-10 minutes.
recipes.summary: Recipes Snacks High Protein Vegetarian

recipes.title: Grilled Chipotle Shrimp Tacos With Cilantro Avocado Dressing Recipe
instructions: Heat grill to around 300 degrees
Spray grill with nonstick spray or toss shrimp with 0.5 tbsp olive oil
Place shrimp on the grill and cook for about 3 minutes
Flip shrimp and cook an additional 2-3 minutes or until pink in color
When shrimp are done cooking, season with chipotle seasoning
Evenly divide chopped cabbage, shrimp, avocado and dressing among 8 corn tortillas
recipes.summary: A healthy grilled chipotle shrimp tacos with cilantro avocado dressing recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Grilled Lime Garlic Fiesta Shrimp Recipe
instructions: Whisk lime juice, garlic oil, lime zest, oregano and salt together
Add shrimp and toss to coat
Cover and chill for 20 minutes
Spray pan with nonstick spray and grill shrimp until pink and cooked through
recipes.summary: A healthy grilled lime garlic fiesta shrimp recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Grilled Skirt Steak And Poblano Fajitas Recipe
instructions: Core and mash avocados, add 0.75 tsp salt, 0.25 tsp pepper, cilantro and 2 tbsp lime juice to make guacamole
Brush onion and peppers with 2 tsp olive oil
Coat steak with remaining 1 tsp olive oil and spice rub (ancho chile, cumin, salt, pepper)
Grill poblano peppers and onion 8-10 minutes, turning often
Grill steak 2-3 minutes per side for medium rare
Let steak rest under foil while slicing onion and peeling and slicing peppers
Toss onion and pepper with 1 tbsp lime juice and 0.25 tsp salt
Slice steak and serve with veggies, guacamole, hot sauce and corn tortillas
recipes.summary: A healthy grilled skirt steak and poblano fajitas recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Grilled Tilapia Tacos With Pico De Gallo Recipe
instructions: Chop tomatoes and toss in a bowl with minced jalapeno, cilantro and onion. Add juice of one lime and salt. This is your pico de gallo - refrigerate
Combine juice of one lime, salt, pepper and olive oil in a bowl and whisk. Marinade tilapia 15-20 minutes maximum
Mix reduced fat sour cream, cilantro and juice of another lime for cream sauce - refrigerate
Grill tilapia until cooked through
Allow tilapia to cool then slice
Place in tortilla, add sour cream mixture, top with pico de gallo
Add hot sauce if desired
recipes.summary: A healthy grilled tilapia tacos with pico de gallo recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Lime BBQ Chicken With Salsa Cream Dipping Sauce Recipe
instructions: Cube chicken
Place cilantro, minced garlic, lime zest, lime juice, olive oil, salt and pepper into a bowl and stir
Place cubed chicken into marinade, cover and refrigerate 30-60 minutes maximum (citrus starts breaking down protein after 60 minutes)
Combine 1 cup sour cream with 1 cup salsa for dipping sauce
Place chicken on 8 skewers and cook on grill
Serve with salsa cream dipping sauce
recipes.summary: A healthy lime bbq chicken with salsa cream dipping sauce recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Sesame CranButter Sirloin Steak Tip Skewers Recipe
ingredients: 3/4 cup Nuts N More High Protein Sesame Cranbutter
instructions: Mix together sesame cranbutter, liquid aminos, garlic and hot water.
Cut sirloin steak into strips.
Marinate in refrigerator for 3-4 hours.
Thread onto skewers and grill to desired doneness.
Serve with remaining marinade as dipping sauce.
recipes.summary: A healthy sesame cranbutter sirloin steak tip skewers recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Smokey Grilled Cheddar And Chipotle Burger Recipe
instructions: Mix beef with salt, pepper, chipotle powder and coffee. Form into 8 patties. Grill until cooked, top with cheese. Serve in bun with onion and BBQ sauce.
recipes.summary: A healthy smokey grilled cheddar and chipotle burger recipe from Muscle & Strength.

recipes.title: Grill Healthy: Spicy Sriracha Lean Beef Burger Recipe
ingredients: 1 tbsp favorite no salt grill seasoning
instructions: - Combine ground beef and grill seasoning.
- Cook on grill until desired doneness.
- Mix together Greek yogurt and Sriracha.
- Spread yogurt mixture onto rolls.
- Layer burger and add toppings.
recipes.summary: Recipes Dinner BBQ/Grill High Protein

recipes.title: Summer BBQ Pulled Pork & Coleslaw Sandwiches Recipe
instructions: Cook pork with BBQ sauce until tender.
Combine coleslaw, greek yogurt, mustard, salt & pepper.
Divide pork among 4 rolls.
Top with coleslaw and serve warm.
recipes.summary: A healthy summer bbq pulled pork & coleslaw sandwiches recipe from Muscle & Strength.
